queue_item.action: Normalize and fail closed on documented gh attestation verify --format=json output before downstream trust-policy evaluation.

progress.finding: Successful gh attestation verification emits an array of verified entries. Downstream policy must reject non-array output, ambiguous cardinality, missing attestation or verificationResult objects, missing verifier-authenticated certificate or timestamps, and incomplete statement structure before identity evaluation.
progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files

queue_item.handoff: Cloudflare Research or Vercel Studio should capture one real successful repository attestation JSON payload and run it through this adapter plus evaluateVerificationOutput. Any shape mismatch should become a new failing fixture rather than a permissive normalization rule.
